1709740.name: Let's Just Farm
1709740.description:
You receive a mysterious letter saying that you have won a sweepstakes you didn't enter.

The prize... a free parcel of land in the middle of nowhere. A farm.

Thinking this could be a fresh start you sell all of your belongings and hit the road saying to yourself "Let's Just Farm!"

Upon arrival you realize why it was being given away. Run down and sun-baked, more weeds than land. A small barely standing house is now your home, but something about this place brings you optimism. It could be the possibilities or the fresh mountain air that give you hope. Either way its going to be a lot of hard work. Day by day, stone by stone.

Gameplay:

  • Farm - Clear the property, Till the earth, Sow seeds and harvest the fruits of your labor.

  • Animals - Keep and raise a variety of animals, some produce goods.

  • Income - Sell harvested crops and goods in your farmstand.

  • Repair - Repair structures on the property using materials.

  • Story - Meet the locals, hear their stories. Figure out why this farm was left behind.

  • Fish - Step away from the toil and sink a few bobbers, who knows what will bite.

  • Mining - Try your hand at busting some stones. Maybe you'll find something valuable.
1709740.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
